skills.name: competitor_site_scraper
skills.description: Scrapes and normalizes career sites of targeted competitors, identifying newly posted opportunities.

skills.name: tech_trend_analyzer
skills.description: Aggregates tech stack requirements across competitor vacancies to identify strategic shifts.

skills.name: threat_index_calculator
skills.description: Quantifies recruitment competition intensity based on relative vacancy volumes and salary ranges.

skills.name: poaching_alert_generator
skills.description: Monitors competitor activity for aggressive expansions that threaten active internal staff retention.
